cases.name: obelisk_reset_and_current_xmult_needs_oracle
cases.known_gap_reason: Obelisk current XMult and reset timing must be captured from visible joker metadata or a real pre/post oracle row before exact validation.

cases.name: certificate_generated_card_identity_needs_oracle
cases.known_gap_reason: Certificate creates a random sealed card at blind start; exact replay validation needs the generated card identity and deck/hand snapshot.

cases.name: the_hook_score_only_rows_need_post_hand_oracle
cases.known_gap_reason: The Hook is modeled for transition replay when the post-hand state is available; isolated score-only rows still need the actual post-Hook held-card list when held-card effects can change scoring.

cases.name: the_pillar_prior_played_card_debuffs_need_oracle
cases.known_gap_reason: The Pillar debuffs previously played cards this ante; exact validation needs stable card identity and prior-play/debuff metadata.

cases.name: cerulean_bell_forced_selection_needs_actual_scored_cards
cases.known_gap_reason: Cerulean Bell is modeled for transition replay by trying the one forced selected card; isolated score-only rows still need the actual forced-card context when the requested card indices are all that was logged.
